brief_notes: Strong computational neuroscience paper with excellent model-data comparison table showing quantitative agreement between model predictions and experimental spike correlations from 47 ensembles (893 neurons). The systematic exploration of NMDAR conductance reduction and NMDA/GABA balance effects is thorough. The critical boundary framework provides genuine mechanistic insight. Minor weakness: the model simplifications (two neuron types, homogeneous Poisson input) are acknowledged but could limit generalizability.
